content.en:
Mitian Jizun received Ye Tian's affirmative reply, and he was still shocked in his heart.

After all, Ye Tian's cultivation time in the Dimensional Sea was not long, maybe it was a long time for Ye Tian, but for an ancient Ultimate Realm Lord like him, this time was nothing at all, there was no need to rush into the Ultimate Land so much!

After entering this time, if there is no way to break through to the ultimate supreme, you will never be able to return, and you will not be able to see your relatives?

If he was put in Ye Tian's position, he might not enter the ultimate place, and it would be good to stay in the Dimensional Sea all the time!

"Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, have you really thought about it?"

Mi Tian Ji Zun asked.

"Think about it!" Ye Tian said lightly: "The human race can survive well without my protection now." So, I want to go to the ultimate place to break through, if I don't go, I'm still unwilling!"

The Mitian Supreme Venerable did not persuade Ye Tian, maybe Ye Tian could really become the ultimate Supreme Venerable!

After all, Ye Tian was too demonic, he had never seen such a demonic Ultimate Realm Lord.

Subsequently, the two chatted for a long time.

Ye Tian also asked Mitian Jizun to form an alliance with the human race and take care of each other, as for whether Mitian Jizun would do this, he didn't care.

Time flies.

Another period of time has passed.

At this time, Ye Tian was finally ready to go to the Ultimate 690 Land.

Before leaving, he said goodbye to his wife, daughter, son, and a group of juniors.

"Husband, can't you not go?"

Xiao Yue was extremely reluctant, because she was not sure if her husband could come back.

Ye Tian touched Xiao Yue's face and said, "Yue'er, don't worry, I will definitely be able to break through the Ultimate Supreme Venerable and return, and at that time, we will never need to be separated." "

Afterwards.

Under the gaze of everyone, Ye Tian followed the induction of the ultimate body, and instantly crossed the void of many dimensions and came to a place of location.

And his other replica bodies were also forcibly pulled by the Ultimate Land, leaving no trace in the Dimensional Sea.

......

The ultimate place.

In the middle of a barren mountain.

Ye Tian descended here, and all the replica bodies were there.

He sensed his surroundings for the first time and found no danger, so he could take a good look at this place in the Ultimate Land.

"The rules of heaven and earth are very powerful, and the suppression of me is at least a hundred times greater than that of the Sea of Dimensions!"

"It's a bit strange why the energy is so thin, less than one thousandth of the sea of dimensions!"

If the energy of the entire Ultimate Land is so thin, then a big battle that can't last long at all will run out of energy, and it will take countless hours to recover energy.

"No, my energy is dissipating invisibly!"

Ye Tian didn't know if it was the problem of this place, or the problem of the entire Ultimate Land.

After he left quickly, his speed was also extremely fast, and these copy bodies were all shuttling in different directions, so it was easy and faster to find a place where the Ultimate Realm Lord Beings gathered.

Time passed slowly.

Finally, one of his replica bodies sensed an incomparably majestic ancient giant city, and immediately approached the past.

"Taiyi City!"

After Ye Tian came here, he was not hindered by anything, and he easily entered.

After entering Taiyi City, he was very low-key and did not rush to inquire about the news.

But he could also see that Taiyi City was covered by an ultimate great array, and no one dared to cause trouble here.

At the same time, he found that many of the race powerhouses in Taiyi City were Ultimate Realm Masters, and they even sensed the existence of the Condensed Ultimate Body, but the number was rarer.

"These powerhouses should almost all be native to the Ultimate Land, and it is unlikely that they all came from places similar to the Sea of Dimensions. "

Ye Tian secretly guessed in his heart.

After that, he stayed in Taiyi City for a long time, and gradually gained some understanding of Taiyi City and the entire Ultimate Land.

And he also learned the cruel truth that the ultimate place is not a friendly place, but a cruel place.

Once a strong person falls, it will be absorbed by the ultimate place and turned into nourishment.

And.

The energy of the Ultimate Land is extremely thin, and there is not much energy left in those Ultimate Realm subjects, and if you want to maintain the energy, you must use the Ultimate Hedron to suppress this situation.

And the Ultimate Hedron is also the only currency in the Ultimate Land, and its value is huge.

The ultimate spar needs to find the ultimate spar vein, and then dig it out, every time the ultimate spar vein is born, it will cause a large number of strong people to be killed, which will cause many strong people to fall and be absorbed by the ultimate land.

"The Ultimate Land is so weird!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

And the Ultimate Land does have the Ultimate Extreme, there are currently a total of eleven Ultimate Extremes, and there are countless creatures in the Ultimate Land, but only eleven Ultimate Extremes have been born, which shows how terrifying the difficulty of breaking through the Ultimate Extremes is!

Ye Tian also learned that in the ultimate land, the creatures under the ultimate realm master have no realm division, and they are uniformly called servants.

It means that creatures of this level can only be called servants, and they have no status to speak of.

Above the servant level, that is, the ultimate realm master, but in the ultimate place, it is called the soldier level, which means that it can only be equivalent to the status of a small soldier, and the status is still not high.

And the strong man who condenses the ultimate body is called a hero, and it is a hero.

The three realms of servant, soldier, and hao are also the three realms that can be encountered normally in the ultimate land, and above the hao level are the ancient level.

Ancient level is an honorific title for a group of ancient beings, who not only condense the ultimate body, but also comprehend the ultimate rules, and can bring out the strength of the ultimate body, and some even raise the ultimate body to the realm of small success and great success.

Above the ancient level is called the eternal level, which refers to the comprehension of the ultimate rules to a certain extent, and the elevation of an ultimate body to the perfection realm.

When you reach the Eternal Level, you are only one step away from the Ultimate Extreme Venerable.

But how to achieve the ultimate supreme, it is impossible to ask.

"Servant, soldier, and hao, these three realms belong to the lower level of the Ultimate Land. The three realms of Ancient Level, Eternal Level, and Ultimate Extreme Venerable are the rulers of the Ultimate Land. "

Ye Tian is only at the Hao level now, he belongs to the Hao Xiong and the Overlord in one area, and has a high status, but it is not worth mentioning in the entire Ultimate Land.

In the ultimate land, comprehending the ultimate rules is undoubtedly a threshold.

Ye Tian also wanted to comprehend the ultimate rule, but the ordinary natives definitely didn't know, so they could only take their time and inquire.
